name: Spiced Pumpkin Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans. In a large mixing bowl, combine pumpkin puree, water, and eggs. Add the yellow cake mix, orange peel, and pumpkin pie spice. Mix on low speed until blended. Increase speed to medium and beat for 5 minutes. Stir in chopped walnuts. Divide batter between the prepared pans. Bake for 28-33 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow cakes to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing them completely onto wire racks to cool.
2. Spread half of the cinnamon cream cheese frosting on one cake layer. Place the second layer on top and spread remaining frosting evenly. Garnish with additional chopped walnuts, if desired.
Note: The original recipe text contained extraneous information that was not part of the actual recipe itself, such as author attribution lines, dates, and additional notes. This has been removed to maintain focus solely on the core recipe instructions.
